content.text: On top of basic search, Claude offers a more advanced
(often framed as an “agentic” or multi‑step research tool) that’s available to Pro users.
, explores different angles automatically, and synthesizes findings into structured reports or outlines without you manually orchestrating each search step.
It’s particularly aimed at deep writing/research workflows: market analysis, literature review, competitive analysis, or technical due‑diligence.
